text: Adopt structural-parent taxonomy convention; demote 'UI' catch-all
description: Convention decision: top-level/area parents should be structural (areas of the product) and contain sub-parents or aims belonging strictly to that area — not a 200-child grab-bag. Concretely: demote the 'UI' parent (22dd4138) into its already-existing children (graph view, list view, watchdog UI/enhancements, project loading) and stop using it as a dumping ground. This is the human-decision half of the Rearrange UI aims goal (18263fc2); the reparent suggester provides the mechanics.
